title: Verify WhatsApp notification is sent when reminder is set and trial ends
description: Test end-to-end flow where user sets reminder and receives WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
preconditions: User is near trial end date (within 24 hours)

steps.description: 1. User enables 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle
2. Wait until 24 hours before trial end

expected_result: User receives WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends saying they can decide then with no accidental charges
